steps: If it is your “high touch” day, wipe all handles (incubator, freezer, door, etc) with 70% ethanol
Wipe bench piettes, etc with 70% ethanol
Wipe phone/other objects in workspace (laptops, etc) with 70% ethanol
Turn off faucet with paper towel
creator: Mansi Srivastava
